content.text:
Now I have an excellent view of atom 22 (C) and all its covalent bonds. From examining the molecule from multiple angles, I can clearly identify the neighbours of atom **C:22**.

## Results

**Molecule:** `geomconf_1914.xyz` → **geomconf_index = 1914**

**Atom 22 (C)** has the following **neighbour atoms** (covalently bonded):

| Atomic Index | Element |
|:---:|:---:|
| 23 | C |
| 19 | C |
| 70 | C |
| 69 | H |

**Summary:** Atom 22 (C) is bonded to three carbon atoms (**C:23**, **C:19**, **C:70**) and one hydrogen atom (**H:69**), giving it four covalent bonds total — consistent with an sp³-hybridized carbon.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 22, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
